channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: I did it
item.description: #include <iostream> int main() { // Declare variables to store the two numbers int num1, num2; // Prompt the user to enter the first number std::cout << "Enter the first number: "; std::cin >> num1; // Prompt the user to enter the second number std::cout << "Enter the second number: "; std::cin >> num2; // Calculate the sum of the two numbers int sum = num1 + num2; // Print the result std::cout << "The sum of " << num1 << " and " << num2 << " is: " << sum << std::endl; return 0; } This will render the code block with C++ syntax highlighting in your Hugo page.
